Home of Elliott Wave 2.0

Institutional-Grade Elliott Wave Research

Institutional-grade multi-timeframe modeling built for accuracy, consistency, and real-world execution.

Discord

X

YouTube

Substack

Our Edge

Institutional precision, retail accessibility.

Daily Market Insight

SPX/ES multi-timeframe wave counts posted 5x/week.

Swing Signals

High-probability setups using Elliott Wave 2.0 model.

Elliott Wave Mastery

Full Education + premium Discord access.

Join EWC Elite

Start with the free tier → 

Meet the Analyst Behind Elliott Wave 2.0

Trigger Trades specializes in trend-focused, rules-based market modeling built on a modernized Elliott Wave framework.

While Elliott Wave is often subjective, he developed a mechanical signal model designed to remove ambiguity and bring structure, compliance, and repeatability to wave-based analysis.

His work blends institutional-grade multi-timeframe modeling with clear execution rules, giving traders a consistent, data-driven path through an otherwise discretionary environment.

Frequently asked questions

Is this an alert service?

This is not an alert service. This is mostly educational based. We do provide detail orientated trade set ups with the best risk reward-ratio, so you can formulate your own trade plan that you are comfortable taking. 

How much is your service?

We offer a monthly fee of $97, which is right about $3/day. Our service also comes with comes with multiple Elliott Wave guides, as well as plentiful educational resources. There are also long term counts and ultimate time frame counts, which are invaluable. 

Can anyone use this service?

At first, Elliott Wave can be very complicated, as it is essentially the same as learning a new language. With practice, patience and discipline, you can drastically reduce the learning curve. We are here to simplify the complexity of the theories nature. Whether you are a beginner, intermediate, or advanced trader/elliottician, this is the place for you.

Do I need to already know the Elliott Wave Principle?

No, it is not necessary to have experience with Elliott Wave Principle to utilize our service. It is preferred, but we keep it as simple as possible to adhere to all traders. 

Who can I contact to learn more?

Twitter: @TriggerTrades

Email: TriggerTradesOfficial@gmail.com

Trigger Trades specializes in trend-focused, rules-based market modeling built on a modernized Elliott Wave framework.<\/p>

We offer a monthly fee of $97, which is right about $3\/day. Our service also comes with comes with multiple Elliott Wave guides, as well as plentiful educational resources. There are also long term counts and ultimate time frame counts, which are invaluable.\u00a0<\/p>","_id":"4b984bb"},{"tab_title":"Can anyone use this service?","tab_content":"

At first, Elliott Wave can be very complicated, as it is essentially the same as learning a new language. With practice, patience and discipline, you can drastically reduce the learning curve. We are here to simplify the complexity of the theories nature. Whether you are a beginner, intermediate, or advanced trader\/elliottician, this is the place for you.<\/p>","_id":"f9e2d34"},{"tab_title":"Do I need to already know the Elliott Wave Principle?","tab_content":"

No, it is not necessary to have experience with Elliott Wave Principle to utilize our service. It is preferred, but we keep it as simple as possible to adhere to all traders.\u00a0<\/p>","_id":"238a9b2"},{"_id":"9cfd36d","tab_title":"Who can I contact to learn more?","tab_content":"
